name: ESPHome (latest)
description: Home automation firmware — configure via YAML
note: Download .bin from ESPHome dashboard after compiling

name: Tasmota
description: Feature-rich open firmware for IoT devices
note: Use Tasmota Web Installer for easiest install

name: WLED
note: Use WLED Web Installer or download .bin from GitHub releases

name: MicroPython
description: Run Python directly on your ESP32
note: Download from micropython.org — use generic ESP32 build

name: Arduino OTA Loader
description: Minimal firmware to enable Arduino OTA updates
note: Compile your sketch in Arduino IDE and export .bin
